summary: Planned one conservative, non-mutating classification for each open PR in the live inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job is explicitly an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No security-sensitive items were detected in the hydrated artifact, and no close, merge, or fix action is recommended under this plan-mode job.

actions.reason: Open maintainer-associated feature/docs PR with its own scope and waiting-on-author label; it is not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate in this inventory shard.

Focused bug-fix PR with supplied proof and passing checks, but still labeled needs proof and not eligible for merge/fix actions in this plan-only inventory job.
Focused Matrix bug-fix PR with useful code and proof; it is independent of the other inventory PRs and should not be closed as duplicate or superseded from this shard.
This PR appears ready for maintainer look, but merge is blocked by job frontmatter and final technical/product correctness for message delivery is a maintainer decision.
